name: Applesauce Cake Squares
recipeIngredient: creamy topping: 1/2 cup heavy cream, 1 teaspoon vanilla, 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon, ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Beat butter in a large bowl until creamy.
3. Blend in eggs, apple juice concentrate, and applesauce.
4. Combine dry ingredients; gradually add to egg mixture, beating until well blended.
5. Stir in apples. Spread batter evenly into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool on a wire rack. Cut into squares.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature, with Creamy Topping if desired.
Creamy Topping:
1. Beat cream in a small bowl until soft peaks form.
2. Beat in vanilla and cinnamon until stiff peaks form.
